pipeline.title: so 结果 · 中译英

items.zh: 下大雨了，所以我们取消了野餐。
items.answer: It rained heavily so we canceled the picnic.

items.zh: 他每天都练习，因此进步很快。
items.answer: He practices every day therefore he improves quickly.

items.zh: 她付出了很多努力，所以最终成功了。
items.answer: She put in a lot of effort so she succeeded at last.

pipeline.title: so 结果 · 英译中

items.en: The demand was high so they hired more workers.
items.answer: 需求很高所以他们雇了更多工人。

items.en: You can rely on her so don't worry.
items.answer: 你可以信赖她，所以不用担心。

items.en: He didn't study so he suffered in the exam.
items.answer: 他没学习，所以考试很痛苦。

pipeline.title: so 结果 · 句型
slots: I was tired I went to bed early
she practiced she won
we got lost we asked for directions

items.zh: 我很累，所以早睡了。
items.answer: I was tired so I went to bed early.

slotValues.slot1: I was tired I went to bed early

items.zh: 她练习了，所以赢了。
items.answer: She practiced so she won.

slotValues.slot1: she practiced she won

items.zh: 我们迷路了，所以问了路。
items.answer: We got lost so we asked for directions.

slotValues.slot1: we got lost we asked for directions

pipeline.title: so 结果 · 一词多句

items.zh: 他很努力，所以通过了考试。
items.answer: He worked hard so he passed the exam.

items.zh: 她很有经验，因此得到了这份工作。
items.answer: She was experienced therefore she got the job.

items.zh: 他迟到了，结果错过了火车。
items.answer: He was late as a result he missed the train.

items.zh: 公司亏钱了，结果不得不裁员。
items.answer: The company lost money as a result they had to cut jobs.

pipeline.title: unless 除非 · 中译英

items.zh: 除非你邀请我，否则我不会参加聚会。
items.answer: I won't attend the party unless you invite me.

items.zh: 除非你处理这个问题，否则它会变得更糟。
items.answer: The problem will get worse unless you handle it.

items.zh: 除非我们面对挑战，否则无法成长。
items.answer: We cannot grow unless we face challenges.

pipeline.title: unless 除非 · 英译中

items.en: You can't escape responsibility unless you quit.
items.answer: 除非你辞职，否则无法逃避责任。

items.en: He will stay depressed unless he gets help.
items.answer: 除非他得到帮助，否则会一直沮丧。

items.en: You can't concentrate unless you get enough sleep.
items.answer: 除非你睡够，否则无法集中精力。

pipeline.title: unless 除非 · 句型
slots: I go you come
she succeed she tries harder
they finish they start now

items.zh: 除非你来，否则我不会去。
items.answer: I won't go unless you come.

slotValues.slot1: I go you come

items.zh: 除非更努力，否则她不会成功。
items.answer: She won't succeed unless she tries harder.

slotValues.slot1: she succeed she tries harder

items.zh: 除非现在开始，否则他们完不成。
items.answer: They won't finish unless they start now.

slotValues.slot1: they finish they start now

pipeline.title: unless 除非 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 基本条件
levels.en: I won't go unless you come.
levels.zh: 除非你来，否则我不去。

levels.label: 加原因
levels.en: I won't go unless you come because I hate going alone.
levels.zh: 除非你来否则我不去，因为我讨厌一个人去。
levels.hint: 加上 because 说明原因

levels.label: 完整表达
levels.en: I won't go unless you come with me because I hate going alone and I'd feel awkward.
levels.zh: 除非你跟我一起去否则我不去，因为我讨厌一个人去而且会觉得尴尬。
levels.hint: 用 and 连接更多细节

pipeline.title: because 原因 · 中译英

items.zh: 他迟到了，因为路上堵车。
items.answer: He was late because the traffic was heavy.

items.zh: 她觉得尴尬，因为没人回答她的问题。
items.answer: She felt embarrassed because no one answered her question.

items.zh: 他受伤了，因为发生了事故。
items.answer: He got injured because there was an accident.

pipeline.title: because 原因 · 英译中

items.en: We decided to explore the city because we had a free day.
items.answer: 我们决定探索这座城市，因为有一天空闲。

items.en: He is popular because he is generous and kind.
items.answer: 他很受欢迎，因为他慷慨又善良。

items.en: I like this cafe because of the relaxing atmosphere.
items.answer: 我喜欢这家咖啡馆，因为氛围很放松。

pipeline.title: because 原因 · 句型
slots: I stayed home I was sick
she passed the test she studied hard
we canceled the trip it rained

items.zh: 我待在家，因为我病了。
items.answer: I stayed home because I was sick.

items.zh: 她通过了考试，因为她努力学习。
items.answer: She passed the test because she studied hard.

slotValues.slot1: she passed the test she studied hard

items.zh: 我们取消了行程，因为下雨了。
items.answer: We canceled the trip because it rained.

slotValues.slot1: we canceled the trip it rained

pipeline.title: because 原因 · 一词多句

items.zh: 他辞职了，因为压力太大。
items.answer: He quit because the pressure was too high.

items.zh: 既然大家都到了，我们开始吧。
items.answer: Since everyone is here let's start.

items.zh: 由于天气不好，我们没出门。
items.answer: As the weather was bad we didn't go out.

items.zh: 由于时间不够，我跳过了早餐。
items.answer: As I had no time I skipped breakfast.

pipeline.title: if 条件 · 中译英

items.zh: 如果你有网络，就能访问这些资源。
items.answer: If you have internet you can access these resources.

items.zh: 如果你掌握了高级技巧，就能胜任这份工作。
items.answer: If you master advanced skills you can handle this job.

items.zh: 如果你受过良好教育，机会会更多。
items.answer: If you are well educated you will have more opportunities.

pipeline.title: if 条件 · 英译中

items.en: If you have technical problems call the support team.
items.answer: 如果你有技术问题，请致电支持团队。

items.en: If the weather is mild we can have a picnic.
items.answer: 如果天气温和，我们可以去野餐。

items.en: If you enjoy outdoor activities you will love this place.
items.answer: 如果你喜欢户外活动，你会爱上这个地方。

pipeline.title: if 条件 · 句型
slots: it rains tomorrow we stay home
you practice more you improve

items.answer: If it rains tomorrow we will stay home.

items.answer: If you practice more you will improve.

slotValues.slot1: you practice more you improve

items.zh: 如果她得到那份工作，她会搬到伦敦。
items.answer: If she gets the job she will move to London.

slotValues.slot1: she gets the job she move to London

pipeline.title: if 条件 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 基本条件
levels.en: If it rains I will stay home.
levels.zh: 如果下雨，我就待在家。

levels.label: 加时间
levels.en: If it rains tomorrow I will stay home and watch a movie.
levels.zh: 如果明天下雨，我就待在家看电影。

levels.label: 加原因
levels.en: If it rains tomorrow I will stay home and watch a movie because I don't like going out in the rain.
levels.zh: 如果明天下雨，我就待在家看电影，因为我不喜欢雨天出门。
levels.hint: 加上 because 说明原因

pipeline.title: as long as 只要 · 中译英

items.zh: 只要你主要集中在学习上，就会进步。
items.answer: As long as you focus mainly on studying you will improve.

items.zh: 只要目前的情况不变，我们就按计划来。
items.answer: As long as the current situation stays the same we follow the plan.

items.zh: 只要你妥善保管财产，就不会有损失。
items.answer: As long as you take care of the property there will be no loss.

pipeline.title: as long as 只要 · 英译中

items.en: As long as consumers are happy we are doing well.
items.answer: 只要消费者满意，我们就做得不错。

items.en: As long as the presentation is ready we can start.
items.answer: 只要演示准备好了，我们就可以开始。

items.en: As long as you quote the source it's fine.
items.answer: 只要你注明出处，就没问题。

pipeline.title: as long as 只要 · 句型
slots: you try your best it's okay
you are happy I am happy

items.answer: As long as you try your best it's okay.

items.answer: As long as you are happy I am happy.

slotValues.slot1: you are happy I am happy

items.answer: As long as it doesn't rain we will go.

pipeline.title: as long as 只要 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: as long as / provided / on condition

items.zh: 只要你按时完成，就没问题。
items.answer: As long as you finish on time it's fine.

items.zh: 只要你提前通知，我们可以改时间。
items.answer: Provided that you inform us in advance we can reschedule.

items.zh: 在你不迟到的条件下，我可以带你去。
items.answer: On condition that you are not late I can take you.

items.zh: 在你不告诉别人的条件下，我告诉你一个秘密。
items.answer: On condition that you don't tell anyone I will tell you a secret.

pipeline.title: and 并列 · 中译英

items.zh: 她既有才华又有美貌。
items.answer: She has both talent and beauty.

items.zh: 他充满激情和能量。
items.answer: He is full of passion and energy.

items.zh: 这座城市既美丽又繁华。
items.answer: The city is beautiful and prosperous.

pipeline.title: and 并列 · 英译中

items.en: He is brave and honest.

items.answer: 她既可靠又勤奋。

items.en: The team is enthusiastic and energetic.
items.answer: 这个团队既热情又有活力。

items.zh: 你要标准间还是豪华间？

items.answer: Are you buying the latest model or the old one?

items.zh: 要足够的食物还是少量零食？
items.answer: Do you want plenty of food or just a few snacks?

items.answer: 这是一个突然的决定还是你计划好的？

pipeline.title: or 选择 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabMeaning: 或者/要么...要么/是否...还是

pipeline.title: but 转折 · 中译英

items.zh: 结果令人失望，但过程很有价值。
items.answer: The result was disappointing but the process was valuable.

items.zh: 工作很麻烦，但薪水不错。
items.answer: The work is unpleasant but the pay is good.

items.zh: 问题很复杂，但我们可以解决。
items.answer: The problem is complex but we can solve it.

pipeline.title: but 转折 · 英译中

items.en: I was amazed by the view but the weather was bad.
items.answer: 景色让我惊叹，但天气不好。

items.en: He was mad at first but later calmed down.
items.answer: 他起初很生气，但后来平静下来了。

items.en: It may seem strange but it's naturally formed.
items.answer: 它可能看起来奇怪，但它是自然形成的。

slots: the food cheap it tastes good

pipeline.title: but 转折 · 一词多句

items.zh: 我想帮你，但我没时间。
items.answer: I want to help you but I have no time.

items.zh: 我想去。然而，我太忙了。
items.answer: I wanted to go. However I was too busy.

items.zh: 他累了，但仍然继续工作。
items.answer: He was tired yet he kept working.

items.zh: 这很简单，然而没人会做。
items.answer: It is simple yet no one can do it.

pipeline.title: however 对比 · 中译英

items.zh: 业务需要扩张。然而，预算有限。
items.answer: The business needs to expand. However the budget is limited.

items.zh: 他想放弃。然而，他不能半途而废。
items.answer: He wanted to abandon it. However he couldn't give up halfway.

items.zh: 我们采取了措施。然而，效果不明显。
items.answer: We took measures. However the effect was not obvious.

pipeline.title: however 对比 · 英译中

items.en: We need additional staff. However we have no budget.
items.answer: 我们需要额外的人手。然而，我们没有预算。

items.en: The plan is generally good. However there are some issues.
items.answer: 这个计划大体不错。然而，还有一些问题。

items.en: Sales increased slightly. However profits dropped sharply.
items.answer: 销量略有增长。然而，利润大幅下降。

levels.label: 简单陈述

pipeline.title: not only...but also 递进 · 中译英

items.answer: He not only made his presence at the meeting but also gave a speech.

items.en: They not only won the vote but also gained public support.

pipeline.title: not only...but also 递进 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: not only...but also / not just...but / as well as
pipeline.vocabMeaning: 不仅...而且/不只是...而且是/以及

patterns.chunk: not only ___ but also ___. / not just ___ but ___.

items.zh: 她不仅美丽而且善良。
items.answer: She is not only beautiful but also kind.

items.zh: 这不只是工作，这是使命。
items.answer: This is not just a job but a mission.

items.zh: 他既有经验又有热情。
items.answer: He has experience as well as passion.

items.answer: This city has history as well as energy.

pipeline.title: when 当…时 · 一词多句

items.zh: 当我年轻的时候常去那里。
items.answer: When I was young I often went there.

items.zh: 每当我有空，我就去跑步。
items.answer: Whenever I have free time I go running.

items.zh: 每次我看到他，他都在笑。
items.answer: Every time I see him he is smiling.

items.zh: 每次我去那家餐厅，都要排队。
items.answer: Every time I go to that restaurant I have to wait in line.

pipeline.title: before/after 前后 · 中译英

items.zh: 在建立信任之前，你需要真诚。
items.answer: Before you establish trust you need to be sincere.

items.zh: 在提出方案之后，我们讨论了细节。
items.answer: After we proposed the plan we discussed the details.

items.zh: 在说服他之前，我们先收集证据。
items.answer: Before we persuade him we need to gather evidence.

pipeline.title: before/after 前后 · 英译中

items.en: Before you sign the contract read it carefully.
items.answer: 在签合同之前，仔细阅读。

items.en: After the supply arrives we can start production.
items.answer: 在供应到达之后，我们可以开始生产。

items.en: Before you buy check a sample first.
items.answer: 在你买之前先检查一下样品。

pipeline.title: before/after 前后 · 句型
slots: I go to bed I brush my teeth
I finished work I went to the gym
you leave turn off the lights

items.zh: 睡觉前我刷牙。
items.answer: Before I go to bed I brush my teeth.

slotValues.slot1: I go to bed I brush my teeth

items.zh: 下班后我去了健身房。
items.answer: After I finished work I went to the gym.

slotValues.slot1: I finished work I went to the gym

items.zh: 你离开前请关灯。
items.answer: Before you leave turn off the lights.

slotValues.slot1: you leave turn off the lights

pipeline.title: before/after 前后 · 一词多句

items.zh: 吃饭前要洗手。
items.answer: Before you eat wash your hands.

items.zh: 下班后我通常去散步。
items.answer: After work I usually go for a walk.

items.zh: 我们先吃了饭。然后去看电影。
items.answer: We had dinner first. Afterwards we went to a movie.

items.zh: 他完成了作业。然后出去玩了。
items.answer: He finished his homework. Afterwards he went out to play.

pipeline.title: until 直到 · 中译英

items.zh: 我们躲在树荫下直到雨停。
items.answer: We stayed under the shelter until the rain stopped.

items.zh: 等到确认没有损坏为止。
items.answer: Wait until we confirm there is no damage.

items.zh: 坚持直到你恢复体力。
items.answer: Keep going until you regain your strength.

pipeline.title: until 直到 · 英译中

items.en: I have an obligation to stay until the job is done.
items.answer: 我有义务待到工作完成。

items.en: Keep exploring the outer space until we find answers.
items.answer: 继续探索外太空，直到我们找到答案。

items.en: Continue this length until it fits perfectly.
items.answer: 继续这个长度直到完全合适。

pipeline.title: until 直到 · 句型
slots: Please wait here I come back
keep trying you succeed
stay inside it stops raining

items.zh: 请在这里等我回来。
items.answer: Please wait here until I come back.

slotValues.slot1: Please wait here I come back

items.zh: 继续尝试直到成功。
items.answer: Keep trying until you succeed.

slotValues.slot1: keep trying you succeed

items.zh: 待在室内直到雨停。
items.answer: Stay inside until it stops raining.

slotValues.slot1: stay inside it stops raining

pipeline.title: until 直到 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 基本动作
levels.en: Please wait here until I come back.
levels.zh: 请在这里等我回来。

levels.label: 加原因
levels.en: Please wait here until I come back because I need your help.
levels.zh: 请在这里等我回来，因为我需要你的帮助。
levels.hint: 加上 because 说明原因

levels.label: 加承诺
levels.en: Please wait here until I come back because I need your help. I promise I won't be long.
levels.zh: 请在这里等我回来，因为我需要你的帮助。我保证不会太久。
levels.hint: 加上 promise 做出承诺

pipeline.title: 时间顺序链 · 中译英

items.zh: 首先按顺序排列，然后检查组合。
items.answer: First arrange them in sequence then check the combination.

items.zh: 首先评估组合方案，然后讨论管理策略。
items.answer: First evaluate the combination then discuss the management strategy.

items.zh: 首先做好管理计划，然后逐步实施。
items.answer: First make a management plan then implement it step by step.

pipeline.title: 时间顺序链 · 英译中

items.en: First share your finding then we can discuss.
items.answer: 先分享你的发现，然后我们可以讨论。

items.en: First gain some insight then make a decision.
items.answer: 先获得一些见解，然后做决定。

items.en: First consult a specialist then start the treatment.
items.answer: 先咨询专家，然后开始治疗。

pipeline.title: 时间顺序链 · 句型
slots: I got up I took a shower I ate breakfast
we went to the museum we had lunch we walked in the park
she did her homework she watched TV she went to bed

items.zh: 首先起床，然后洗澡，之后吃早饭。
items.answer: First I got up. Then I took a shower. After that I ate breakfast.

slotValues.slot1: I got up I took a shower I ate breakfast

items.zh: 先去博物馆，然后吃午饭，之后在公园散步。
items.answer: First we went to the museum. Then we had lunch. After that we walked in the park.

slotValues.slot1: we went to the museum we had lunch we walked in the park

items.zh: 她先做作业，然后看电视，之后上床睡觉。
items.answer: First she did her homework. Then she watched TV. After that she went to bed.

slotValues.slot1: she did her homework she watched TV she went to bed

pipeline.title: 时间顺序链 · 一词多句

items.zh: 先准备材料，然后开始制作，最后包装。
items.answer: First prepare the materials. Then start making it. Finally pack it up.

items.zh: 先买票，然后入场，最后找座位。
items.answer: First buy tickets. Then enter. Finally find your seat.

items.zh: 先去银行，然后去超市，再回家。
items.answer: First go to the bank. After that go to the supermarket. Then go home.

items.zh: 先复习课文，然后做练习，再检查答案。
items.answer: First review the text. After that do the exercises. Then check the answers.

pipeline.title: for example 举例 · 中译英

items.zh: 举个例子，这个印象一直留在我的脑海里。
items.answer: For instance this impression has stayed in my mind.

items.zh: 例如，第一印象很重要。
items.answer: For example first impressions matter a lot.

items.zh: 比如，建立连接需要时间。
items.answer: For example building connections takes time.

pipeline.title: for example 举例 · 英译中

items.en: There is a sharp contrast. For example the rich and the poor.
items.answer: 有鲜明的对比。比如富人和穷人。

items.en: This facility offers many services. For example free Wi-Fi.
items.answer: 这个设施提供很多服务。比如免费Wi-Fi。

items.en: You need to work effectively. For example set clear goals.
items.answer: 你需要高效工作。比如设定明确目标。

pipeline.title: for example 举例 · 句型
slots: sports I play basketball
music I listen to pop
movies I watch comedies

items.zh: 我喜欢运动。比如打篮球。
items.answer: I like sports. For example I play basketball.

slotValues.slot1: sports I play basketball

items.zh: 我喜欢音乐。比如听流行歌曲。
items.answer: I like music. For example I listen to pop.

slotValues.slot1: music I listen to pop

items.zh: 我喜欢电影。比如看喜剧片。
items.answer: I like movies. For example I watch comedies.

slotValues.slot1: movies I watch comedies

pipeline.title: for example 举例 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: for example / for instance / such as

items.zh: 我喜欢户外活动。比如爬山和骑行。
items.answer: I enjoy outdoor activities. For example hiking and cycling.

items.zh: 很多水果对健康好。比如苹果和香蕉。
items.answer: Many fruits are good for health. For instance apples and bananas.

items.zh: 我喜欢像篮球这样的运动。
items.answer: I like sports such as basketball.

items.zh: 她会说多种语言，比如英语和法语。
items.answer: She speaks many languages such as English and French.

pipeline.title: also/too/as well 补充 · 中译英

items.zh: 我们还需要结合这些想法。另外也要考虑发展。
items.answer: We need to combine these ideas. Also consider the development.

items.zh: 发展很重要。文化发展同样重要。
items.answer: Development is important. Cultural development is important too.

items.zh: 我们有文化交流项目。也有学生交换项目。
items.answer: We have cultural exchange programs. Also we have student exchange programs.

pipeline.title: also/too/as well 补充 · 英译中

items.en: We focus on domestic markets. Also we explore international ones.
items.answer: 我们关注国内市场。也探索国际市场。

items.en: The show can educate. It can entertain as well.
items.answer: 这个节目能教育人。也能娱乐人。

items.en: We need domestic investment. International investment too.
items.answer: 我们需要国内投资。国际投资也需要。

pipeline.title: also/too/as well 补充 · 句型
slots: She is kind she is hardworking
I like coffee I like tea
He can sing he can dance

items.zh: 她很善良。而且很勤奋。
items.answer: She is kind. Also she is hardworking.

slotValues.slot1: She is kind she is hardworking

items.zh: 我喜欢咖啡。也喜欢茶。
items.answer: I like coffee. Also I like tea.

slotValues.slot1: I like coffee I like tea

items.zh: 他会唱歌。也会跳舞。
items.answer: He can sing. Also he can dance.

slotValues.slot1: He can sing he can dance

pipeline.title: also/too/as well 补充 · 一词多句

items.zh: 她喜欢音乐。也喜欢绘画。
items.answer: She likes music. Also she likes painting.

items.zh: 我喜欢这个。她也喜欢。
items.answer: I like this. She likes it too.

items.zh: 他说英语，也说日语。
items.answer: He speaks English and he speaks Japanese as well.

items.zh: 她善良，也很聪明。
items.answer: She is kind and she is smart as well.

pipeline.title: besides/what's more 递进 · 中译英

items.zh: 委员会批准了方案。此外，还启动了推广活动。
items.answer: The committee approved the plan. Besides they launched a campaign.

items.zh: 我们发起了活动。而且，目标很宏大。
items.answer: We started a campaign. What's more the goal is grand.

items.zh: 这个计划很宏大。而且，可行性很高。
items.answer: The plan is grand. Besides it's highly feasible.

pipeline.title: besides/what's more 递进 · 英译中

items.en: The place is beautiful. Furthermore it has a mysterious atmosphere.
items.answer: 这个地方很美。而且有一种神秘的氛围。

items.en: He is very talented. What's more he is sensitive to others' feelings.
items.answer: 他很有才华。而且他很敏感，能体察别人的感受。

items.en: The story is mysterious. Furthermore the ending is surprising.
items.answer: 故事很神秘。而且结尾出人意料。

pipeline.title: besides/what's more 递进 · 句型
slots: this restaurant is nice the prices are good
the movie is funny the music is wonderful
he is smart he is hardworking

items.zh: 这家餐厅不错。而且价格也实惠。
items.answer: This restaurant is nice. Besides the prices are good.

slotValues.slot1: this restaurant is nice the prices are good

items.zh: 电影很好笑。而且音乐很棒。
items.answer: The movie is funny. What's more the music is wonderful.

slotValues.slot1: the movie is funny the music is wonderful

items.zh: 他很聪明。而且很勤奋。
items.answer: He is smart. What's more he is hardworking.

slotValues.slot1: he is smart he is hardworking

pipeline.title: besides/what's more 递进 · 一词多句

items.zh: 这家酒店位置好。而且价格合理。
items.answer: This hotel is well located. Besides the price is reasonable.

items.zh: 他很有经验。而且态度也很好。
items.answer: He is very experienced. What's more his attitude is great.

items.zh: 项目很有前景。而且我们已经有了资金。
items.answer: The project is promising. Moreover we already have funding.

items.zh: 方案很创新。此外实施起来也不难。
items.answer: The solution is innovative. Furthermore it's not hard to implement.

pipeline.title: either 否定补充 · 中译英

items.zh: 他们不会拒绝这个提议。我们也不会。
items.answer: They won't reject the offer. We won't either.

items.zh: 他们不会惩罚孩子。我们也不会。
items.answer: They won't punish the child. We won't either.

items.zh: 他不会为此挣扎。你也不必。
items.answer: He won't struggle with it. You don't have to either.

pipeline.title: either 否定补充 · 英译中

items.en: He is not unemployed. She isn't either.
items.answer: 他没有失业。她也没有。

items.en: Don't blame the victim. Don't blame yourself either.
items.answer: 不要责怪受害者。也不要责怪自己。

items.en: The exam isn't tough. The homework isn't either.
items.answer: 考试不难。家庭作业也不难。

slots: like coffee like tea
eat meat eat fish
drink alcohol smoke

items.answer: I don't like coffee. I don't like tea either.

slotValues.slot1: like coffee like tea

items.zh: 我不吃肉。也不吃鱼。
items.answer: I don't eat meat. I don't eat fish either.

slotValues.slot1: eat meat eat fish

items.zh: 我不喝酒。也不抽烟。
items.answer: I don't drink alcohol. I don't smoke either.

slotValues.slot1: drink alcohol smoke

pipeline.title: either 否定补充 · 一词多句

items.zh: 我不喜欢咖啡。也不喜欢茶。
items.answer: I don't like coffee. I don't like tea either.

items.zh: 他既不会唱歌也不会跳舞。
items.answer: He can neither sing nor dance.

items.zh: 他不是学生。她也不是。
items.answer: He isn't a student. She isn't either.

items.zh: 我不累。他也不累。
items.answer: I'm not tired. He isn't either.

pipeline.title: 对话衔接词 · 中译英

items.zh: 嗯，很明显这个计划需要改进。
items.answer: Well obviously this plan needs improvement.

items.zh: 老实说，这需要一个体面的解决方案。
items.answer: To be honest we need a decent solution.

items.zh: 顺便说一下，我的第一印象不错。
items.answer: By the way my first impression was good.

pipeline.title: 对话衔接词 · 英译中

items.en: Actually you need a license to drive here.
items.answer: 实际上，在这里开车需要驾照。

items.en: I mean this is not the best means to solve it.
items.answer: 我的意思是，这不是解决这个问题的最好方法。

items.en: Well that portrait is really impressive.
items.answer: 嗯，那幅画像真的很令人印象深刻。

pipeline.title: 对话衔接词 · 句型
slots: I think it's a good idea
I don't like coffee I prefer tea
did you hear about the party

items.zh: 嗯，我觉得这是个好主意。
items.answer: Well I think it's a good idea.

slotValues.slot1: I think it's a good idea

items.zh: 实际上，我不喜欢咖啡。我更喜欢茶。
items.answer: Actually I don't like coffee. I prefer tea.

slotValues.slot1: I don't like coffee I prefer tea

items.zh: 顺便说一下，你听说那个派对了吗？
items.answer: By the way did you hear about the party?

slotValues.slot1: did you hear about the party

pipeline.title: 对话衔接词 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: well / actually / by the way / anyway
pipeline.vocabMeaning: 嗯/实际上/顺便说一下/不管怎样

items.zh: 嗯，我也不确定。
items.answer: Well I'm not sure either.

items.zh: 实际上，我改变主意了。
items.answer: Actually I changed my mind.

items.zh: 顺便问一下，几点了？
items.answer: By the way what time is it?

items.zh: 不管怎样，我们继续吧。
items.answer: Anyway let's move on.

pipeline.title: 多步骤叙事 · 中译英

items.zh: 首先按顺序排列，然后添加细节。
items.answer: First arrange them in sequence then add the details.

items.zh: 除了这些，还需要增加新方案。
items.answer: In addition to these we need to add a new scheme.

items.zh: 首先制定方案，然后按步骤执行。
items.answer: First make a scheme then follow the steps.

pipeline.title: 多步骤叙事 · 英译中

items.en: First set the alarm. Then get ready. Finally leave.
items.answer: 先设好闹钟。然后准备好。最后出发。

items.en: First wait for the signal. Then follow the command.
items.answer: 先等信号。然后执行命令。

items.en: First take command. Then organize the team.
items.answer: 先接管指挥。然后组织团队。

pipeline.title: 多步骤叙事 · 句型
slots: wake up take a shower eat breakfast go to work
buy tickets enter the cinema watch the movie leave
prepare materials mix them bake the cake decorate it

items.zh: 先起床，然后洗澡，之后吃早饭，最后上班。
items.answer: First wake up. Then take a shower. After that eat breakfast. Finally go to work.

slotValues.slot1: wake up take a shower eat breakfast go to work

items.zh: 先买票，然后入场，之后看电影，最后离开。
items.answer: First buy tickets. Then enter the cinema. After that watch the movie. Finally leave.

slotValues.slot1: buy tickets enter the cinema watch the movie leave

items.zh: 先准备材料，然后混合，之后烤蛋糕，最后装饰。
items.answer: First prepare materials. Then mix them. After that bake the cake. Finally decorate it.

slotValues.slot1: prepare materials mix them bake the cake decorate it

pipeline.title: 多步骤叙事 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 一步
levels.en: First I woke up.
levels.zh: 首先我起床了。

levels.label: 两步
levels.en: First I woke up. Then I took a shower.
levels.zh: 首先我起床了。然后我洗了澡。

levels.label: 完整链
levels.en: First I woke up. Then I took a shower. After that I ate breakfast. Finally I went to work.
levels.zh: 首先我起床了。然后洗了澡。之后吃了早饭。最后去上班。
levels.hint: 用 After that 和 Finally 完成叙事链

pipeline.title: 因果链叙事 · 中译英

items.zh: 因为它的存在，所以我们必须小心。
items.answer: Because of its existence we must be careful.

items.zh: 因为压力很大，所以他的情绪很强烈。
items.answer: The pressure was intense so his emotions were strong.

items.zh: 因为他直接参与了，所以知道内情。
items.answer: He was directly involved so he knew the details.

pipeline.title: 因果链叙事 · 英译中

items.en: The system is efficient so we save time.
items.answer: 系统效率高，所以我们节省了时间。

items.en: He showed great enthusiasm so the team was motivated.
items.answer: 他展现了极大的热情，所以团队很有动力。

items.en: She has a clear vision so the project succeeded.
items.answer: 她有清晰的愿景，所以项目成功了。

pipeline.title: 因果链叙事 · 句型
slots: I stayed home I was sick
I was tired I went to bed early
she studied hard she passed the exam

items.zh: 我待在家，因为我病了。
items.answer: I stayed home because I was sick.

slotValues.slot1: I stayed home I was sick

items.zh: 我很累，所以早早上床了。
items.answer: I was tired so I went to bed early.

slotValues.slot1: I was tired I went to bed early

items.zh: 她努力学习，所以通过了考试。
items.answer: She studied hard so she passed the exam.

slotValues.slot1: she studied hard she passed the exam

pipeline.title: 因果链叙事 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: because / so / therefore / as a result

items.zh: 他迟到了因为错过了公交。
items.answer: He was late because he missed the bus.

items.zh: 因为下雨了，我们待在屋里。
items.answer: Because it rained we stayed inside.

items.zh: 我饿了，所以吃了个三明治。
items.answer: I was hungry so I ate a sandwich.

items.zh: 他很有经验。因此他得到了晋升。
items.answer: He is very experienced. Therefore he got promoted.

pipeline.title: 条件链叙事 · 中译英

items.zh: 如果他被捕了，就会影响他的前途。
items.answer: If he gets arrested it will affect his future.

items.zh: 如果你掌握基本技能，就能找到工作。
items.answer: If you master the basic skills you can find a job.

items.zh: 如果你拿到官方许可，就可以开始。
items.answer: If you get official permission you can start.

pipeline.title: 条件链叙事 · 英译中

items.en: If it's a private matter you should handle it carefully.
items.answer: 如果是私事，你应该小心处理。

items.en: If you have particular concerns please let us know.
items.answer: 如果你有特别的顾虑，请告诉我们。

items.en: If a relative visits we need to prepare the guest room.
items.answer: 如果有亲戚来访，我们需要准备客房。

pipeline.title: 条件链叙事 · 句型
slots: it rains I'll stay home
you study you will pass
you try you won't know

items.zh: 如果下雨，我就待在家。
items.answer: If it rains I'll stay home.

slotValues.slot1: it rains I'll stay home

items.zh: 如果你学习，就能通过。
items.answer: If you study you will pass.

slotValues.slot1: you study you will pass

items.zh: 除非你尝试，否则不会知道。
items.answer: Unless you try you won't know.

slotValues.slot1: you try you won't know

pipeline.title: 条件链叙事 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 基本条件
levels.en: If you study hard you will pass.
levels.zh: 如果你努力学习，就能通过。

levels.label: 加结果
levels.en: If you study hard you will pass and get a good grade.
levels.zh: 如果你努力学习，就能通过并且取得好成绩。
levels.hint: 加上 and 连接更多结果

levels.label: 加条件限制
levels.en: If you study hard you will pass and get a good grade but only if you practice as well.
levels.zh: 如果你努力学习就能通过并取得好成绩，但前提是你也要练习。
levels.hint: 用 but only if 添加限制条件

pipeline.title: 时间链叙事 · 中译英

items.zh: 当我熟悉了环境后我开始追求梦想。
items.answer: When I became familiar with the environment I started to pursue my dream.

items.zh: 在我们追求目标之前先了解地形。
items.answer: Before we pursue our goal first understand the landscape.

items.zh: 当我看到那片风景时我决定留下来。
items.answer: When I saw the landscape I decided to stay.

pipeline.title: 时间链叙事 · 英译中

items.en: After we bought the cottage we renovated it.
items.answer: 我们买了那间小屋之后装修了它。

items.en: Before you pack the chest make a list.
items.answer: 在打包箱子之前先列个清单。

items.en: While I was cleaning the garage I found old photos.
items.answer: 我在打扫车库的时候发现了一些老照片。

pipeline.title: 时间链叙事 · 句型
slots: I arrived she was cooking
I finished work I went home
you leave turn off the lights

items.zh: 我到的时候她正在做饭。
items.answer: When I arrived she was cooking.

slotValues.slot1: I arrived she was cooking

items.zh: 下班后我回家了。
items.answer: After I finished work I went home.

slotValues.slot1: I finished work I went home

items.zh: 你离开前请关灯。
items.answer: Before you leave turn off the lights.

slotValues.slot1: you leave turn off the lights

pipeline.title: 时间链叙事 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: when / while / before / after / by the time
pipeline.vocabMeaning: 当...时/在...期间/在...之前/在...之后/到...时

items.zh: 我到家时她在看书。
items.answer: When I got home she was reading.

items.zh: 我在做饭时他在听音乐。
items.answer: While I was cooking he was listening to music.

items.zh: 睡觉前我喝了一杯牛奶。
items.answer: Before I went to bed I drank a glass of milk.

items.zh: 吃完饭后我们去散步了。
items.answer: After we finished dinner we went for a walk.

pipeline.title: 混合观点表达 · 中译英

items.zh: 老实说我很同情他但是他的计划不确定。
items.answer: To be honest I have sympathy for him but his plan is not definite.

items.zh: 我理解你的感受不过我们不缺同情。
items.answer: I understand your feelings. However sympathy alone is not enough.

items.zh: 我认为这是一个肯定的答复但是还需要确认。
items.answer: I think it's a definite yes but we still need to confirm.

pipeline.title: 混合观点表达 · 英译中

items.en: I think enthusiasm is important but it's not everything.
items.answer: 我认为热情很重要，但它不是全部。

items.en: I believe the competition is intense however we can win.
items.answer: 我相信竞争很激烈，但我们可以赢。

items.en: In my opinion this brand is good but it's too expensive.
items.answer: 在我看来这个品牌不错，但是太贵了。

pipeline.title: 混合观点表达 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: I think ___. However ___. / In my opinion ___ because ___ but ___.
pipeline.patternMeaning: 我认为...。然而...。/在我看来...因为...但是...。
slots: this is a good plan we need more time
I agree with you I have some concerns
the movie was good the ending was weak

items.zh: 我觉得这是个好计划。然而我们需要更多时间。
items.answer: I think this is a good plan. However we need more time.

slotValues.slot1: this is a good plan we need more time

items.zh: 我同意你的看法。然而我有一些顾虑。
items.answer: I agree with you. However I have some concerns.

slotValues.slot1: with you I have some concerns

items.zh: 我觉得电影不错。然而结局太弱了。
items.answer: I think the movie was good. However the ending was weak.

slotValues.slot1: the movie was good the ending was weak

pipeline.title: 混合观点表达 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 基本观点
levels.en: I think this is a good plan.
levels.zh: 我觉得这是个好计划。

levels.label: 加转折
levels.en: I think this is a good plan. However we need more time.
levels.zh: 我觉得这是个好计划。然而我们需要更多时间。

levels.label: 完整表达
levels.en: I think this is a good plan. However we need more time because the budget is tight and we have to be careful.
levels.zh: 我觉得这是个好计划。然而我们需要更多时间因为预算紧张，我们必须小心。
levels.hint: 用 because 和 and 组成完整链
